slides.title: Yearlit has changed
slides.subtitle: Faster. Sleeker. Rock-solid.
slides.body: The 1.8.0 update brings a lot - I've been working hard to deliver the best experience yet. Translation: PERFORMANCE.

slides.title: Built to stay solid
slides.subtitle: Fewer glitches, more trust.
items: Streaks stay accurate across time zones
No more random calendar switching after edits

slides.title: Boards, but fast
slides.subtitle: Everything snaps into place.
items: Board view loads quicker with smarter caching
Overall performance boost you can feel

slides.title: Calendars, organized
slides.subtitle: Clean views when you need them.
items: Archive old calendars instead of deleting
Reordering and navigation work the way they should

slides.title: A cleaner look
slides.subtitle: Polish you notice right away.
items: Liquid Glass styling across the app
More stable UI in everyday use
